<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ar" dir="rtl">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
<title>نُشيطة والنجوم الطيّبة — ركن صافي</title>
<meta name="description" content="لعبة تفاعلية من ركن صافي: ساعد النحلة نُشيطة على جمع الأخلاق الحسنة، واحذر النجوم السيئة!">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#2b3566">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent">
<meta name="mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:title" content="نُشيطة والنجوم الطيّبة 🐝⭐">
<meta property="og:description" content="اجمع الأخلاق الحسنة… واحذر النجوم السيئة! لعبة من ركن صافي 🌿">
<meta property="og:locale" content="ar_AR">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=\'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\' viewBox=\'0 0 100 100\'%3E%3Ctext y=\'.9em\' font-size=\'90\'%3E%F0%9F%90%9D%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Amiri:wght@700&family=Tajawal:wght@500;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{
  --cream:#FAF6F0; --gold:#E8A93D; --teal:#4FD1C5; --correct:#2EB8A0;
  --wrong:#D1477E; --purple:#B983FF; --ink:#232A45; --peri:#7E93D4;
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
html,body{margin:0;height:100%;}
body{font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;background:#1b2145;color:var(--ink);
  overflow:hidden;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}

/* ===== إطار موحّد: كل الشاشات بنفس الأبعاد (9:16) ===== */
#frame{
  position:relative;
  width:min(100vw, calc((100dvh) * 0.5581));   /* 768/1376 */
  height:min(100dvh, calc(100vw / 0.5581));
  max-width:430px; max-height:770px;
  overflow:hidden;border-radius:0;
  background:#2b3566;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06);
}
#gameHost{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}

/* ================= الشاشات ذات الخلفية ================= */
.scr{position:absolute;inset:0;background-size:100% 100%;background-position:center;
  z-index:20;animation:fadeIn .4s ease;}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}

/* --- البداية: حقل الاسم بالأعلى، الزر بالأسفل --- */
.name-box{position:absolute;top:3.2%;left:8%;right:8%;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;z-index:3;}
.name-lbl{font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-size:clamp(15px,4.4vw,19px);font-weight:700;color:#fff;
  text-shadow:0 2px 9px rgba(0,0,0,.7);}
.name-in{width:100%;font-family:'Tajawal';font-weight:800;font-size:clamp(15px,4.4vw,18px);
  text-align:center;padding:11px 14px;border-radius:16px;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.8);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.95);color:var(--ink);outline:none;
  box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.32);}
.name-in:focus{border-color:var(--teal);box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(79,209,197,.4);}
.name-err{font-size:12px;font-weight:800;color:#ffd7e6;min-height:15px;
  text-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.75);}

.start-btn-wrap{position:absolute;bottom:5.5%;left:0;right:0;display:flex;justify-content:center;z-index:3;}
.btn-go{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f3bd57,var(--gold));color:#fff;border:none;
  font-family:'Tajawal';font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(17px,5vw,21px);
  padding:13px 52px;border-radius:50px;cursor:pointer;
  box-shadow:0 6px 0 #c98a26,0 12px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.3);touch-action:manipulation;}
.btn-go:active{transform:translateY(3px);box-shadow:0 3px 0 #c98a26,0 6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.24);}

/* --- النهاية: النص داخل المستطيل الكريمي المقاس (10%–89.8% / 36.7%–55.5%) --- */
.end-card{position:absolute;left:12%;right:12%;top:36.7%;height:18.8%;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  text-align:center;gap:4px;padding:4px;z-index:3;}
/* اسم البطل: بانر كبير فوق المستطيل (خارجه) */
.end-name{position:absolute;left:4%;right:4%;top:21.5%;height:11%;z-index:4;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-weight:700;
  font-size:clamp(36px,11.1vw,51px);color:#fff;line-height:1.05;
  text-shadow:0 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.30), 0 0 26px rgba(232,169,61,.9),
              0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
  white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;
  animation:nameIn .55s cubic-bezier(.2,1.3,.4,1) both;}
@keyframes nameIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-14px) scale(.86)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.end-score{font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-weight:700;
  font-size:clamp(21px,6.2vw,29px);color:var(--gold);line-height:1.35;}
.end-rank{font-family:'Tajawal';font-weight:800;
  font-size:clamp(14px,4.4vw,19px);color:var(--purple);line-height:1.3;}

.end-btns{position:absolute;left:0;right:0;bottom:3.5%;
  display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:10px;padding:0 14px;z-index:3;}
.end-btn{font-family:'Tajawal';font-weight:800;font-size:clamp(12px,3.7vw,15px);border:none;
  padding:11px 18px;border-radius:15px;cursor:pointer;color:#fff;
  box-shadow:0 5px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.34);touch-action:manipulation;white-space:nowrap;}
.end-btn.g{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f3bd57,var(--gold));}
.end-btn.p{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#c99cff,#a76fe8);}
.end-btn:active{transform:translateY(2px);}

/* =========================================================
   ★ ثابت البلوك — CSS لعبة النجوم المتساقطة (st-)
========================================================= */
.st-stage{position:relative;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;
  border-radius:22px;min-height:0;background:#3a4a86;}
/* صورة السماء خلفيةً */
.st-sky{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;background-size:cover;background-position:center bottom;}
.st-hud{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:6px;padding:10px 12px;z-index:8;}
.st-chip{background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);border-radius:14px;padding:6px 12px;font-weight:800;
  font-size:14px;color:var(--ink);box-shadow:0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.14);white-space:nowrap;}
.st-chip .score-n{color:var(--correct);}
.st-chip.target{color:var(--gold);}
/* غيمة الساعة وسط السما */
.st-cloud{position:absolute;top:18px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:7;
  background:#fff;border-radius:40px;padding:7px 26px 9px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
  box-shadow:0 7px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.20);}
.st-cloud::before,.st-cloud::after{content:"";position:absolute;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;z-index:-1;}
.st-cloud::before{width:38px;height:38px;top:-13px;left:26px;}
.st-cloud::after{width:30px;height:30px;top:-10px;right:30px;
  box-shadow:38px 8px 0 -4px #fff,-96px 6px 0 -6px #fff;}
.st-cloud .t-ic{font-size:20px;line-height:1;}
.st-cloud .t-num{font-family:'Tajawal';font-weight:800;font-size:32px;line-height:1;color:var(--peri);
  min-width:44px;text-align:center;}
.st-cloud.low{animation:tick .55s ease-in-out infinite;}
.st-cloud.low .t-num{color:var(--wrong);}
@keyframes tick{0%,100%{transform:translateX(-50%) scale(1)}50%{transform:translateX(-50%) scale(1.12)}}
.st-field{position:relative;flex:1;overflow:hidden;touch-action:none;z-index:1;}

/* النجمة الساقطة */
.st-star{position:absolute;left:0;top:0;width:0;height:0;z-index:3;will-change:transform;
  pointer-events:none;}
.st-shape{position:absolute;left:-42px;top:-42px;width:84px;height:84px;
  background-size:contain;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-position:center;}
/* الحسنة: هيلوغرافيك بنفسجي متوهّج */
.st-star.good .st-shape{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(185,131,255,.9));
  animation:glowG 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes glowG{0%,100%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(185,131,255,.7)) brightness(1)}
  50%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 17px rgba(232,169,61,.85)) brightness(1.12)}}
/* السيئة: زرقاء باهتة + اهتزاز خفيف */
.st-star.bad .st-shape{opacity:.42;filter:grayscale(.55) brightness(.78);
  animation:wobbleB .42s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes wobbleB{0%,100%{transform:rotate(-6deg) scale(.96)}50%{transform:rotate(6deg) scale(.96)}}
.st-word{position:absolute;left:-40px;top:-13px;width:80px;height:26px;display:flex;
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.st-word span{background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);border-radius:8px;padding:2px 8px;
  font-family:'Tajawal';font-weight:800;font-size:14px;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.15;
  box-shadow:0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,.18);}
.st-star.caught .st-shape{animation:catchPop .34s ease-out forwards;}
@keyframes catchPop{to{transform:scale(1.7);opacity:0}}
.st-star.caught .st-word{animation:catchFade .28s ease-out forwards;}
@keyframes catchFade{to{opacity:0;transform:scale(.6)}}

/* الماسِك: السلّة (صورة) مركزية على catcherX + نشيطة بجانبها */
.st-catcher{position:absolute;bottom:60px;left:50%;z-index:6;pointer-events:none;
  transform:translateX(-50%);}
.st-basket{position:relative;width:112px;height:124px;z-index:2;
  background-size:contain;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-position:center bottom;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 5px 9px rgba(0,0,0,.32));}
.st-nashita{position:absolute;bottom:6px;right:100%;margin-right:-18px;width:124px;height:auto;z-index:3;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 5px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.30));}
.st-nashita.cheer{animation:cheerBounce .5s ease;transform-origin:bottom center;}
@keyframes cheerBounce{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}40%{transform:translateY(-14px) rotate(-6deg)}}
.st-catcher.grabbing .st-nashita{transform:translateY(-2px);}

/* جسيمات التوهّج عند المسك */
.st-particle{position:absolute;width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:5;
  transition:transform .5s ease-out,opacity .5s ease-out;}


/* ===== إضافات النسخة الدعائيّة ===== */
.st-hearts{color:var(--wrong);font-size:22px;letter-spacing:2px;line-height:1;}
.st-hearts .off{opacity:.22;filter:grayscale(1);}

/* ================= شاشة «مَن هيثم؟» (خلفية مولّدة) ================= */
.info{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:40;
  background-size:100% 100%;background-position:center;
  animation:fadeIn .35s ease;}
/* الشريط السفلي الحرّ في الصورة: البطاقة تنتهي عند ٨٧٫١٪ */
.info-btns{position:absolute;left:0;right:0;bottom:2.4%;z-index:3;
  display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:10px;padding:0 14px;}
.info-btn{font-family:'Tajawal';font-weight:800;font-size:clamp(12px,3.7vw,15px);
  border:none;padding:11px 16px;border-radius:15px;cursor:pointer;color:#fff;
  box-shadow:0 5px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.34);touch-action:manipulation;white-space:nowrap;}
.info-btn.fb{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#4e7fe0,#2f5fc7);}

.info-btn.g{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f3bd57,var(--gold));}
.info-btn:active{transform:translateY(2px);}

@keyframes shakeSt{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}25%{transform:translateX(-7px)}75%{transform:translateX(7px)}}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="frame">
  <div id="gameHost"></div>
</div>

<script>
/* ====================== الصور (base64) ====================== */
const NASHITA_CONFIDENT = "data:image/webp;base64,";
const NASHITA_CELEBRATE = "data:image/webp;base64,";
const STAR_GOOD_IMG     = "data:image/webp;base64,";
const STAR_BAD_IMG      = "data:image/webp;base64,";
const BASKET_IMG        = "data:image/webp;base64,";
const SKY_IMG           = "data:image/webp;base64,";
const BG_START          = "data:image/webp;base64,";
const BG_INFO           = "data:image/webp;base64,";
const HAYTHAM_IMG       = "data:image/webp;base64,";
const BG_END            = "data:image/webp;base64,";

/* ====================== كلمات الأخلاق ====================== */
const WORDS = [
  {t:'رِفق',good:true},{t:'صِدق',good:true},{t:'تعاوُن',good:true},{t:'صبر',good:true},
  {t:'رحمة',good:true},{t:'أمانة',good:true},{t:'محبّة',good:true},{t:'بِرّ',good:true},
  {t:'حياء',good:true},{t:'كرم',good:true},{t:'تواضُع',good:true},{t:'شُكر',good:true},
  {t:'عفو',good:true},{t:'وفاء',good:true},{t:'حِلم',good:true},{t:'عدل',good:true},
  {t:'قناعة',good:true},{t:'إيثار',good:true},
  {t:'كذب',good:false},{t:'غِيبة',good:false},{t:'حسد',good:false},{t:'بخل',good:false},
  {t:'كِبْر',good:false},{t:'غضب',good:false},{t:'سخرية',good:false},{t:'أنانيّة',good:false},
  {t:'نميمة',good:false},{t:'خيانة',good:false}
];

const RANKS = [
  {min:50, label:'👑 مَلِكة الأخلاق'},
  {min:30, label:'✨ نحلةٌ ماهرة'},
  {min:15, label:'🐝 نحلةٌ نشيطة'},
  {min:0,  label:'🌱 نحلةٌ صغيرة'}
];
function rankOf(s){ for(const r of RANKS){ if(s>=r.min) return r.label; } return RANKS[RANKS.length-1].label; }

/* ======================================================================
   نسخة دعائيّة مستقلّة من بلوك «النجوم المتساقطة»
   لعب مستمرّ — تنتهي عند التقاط ٣ نجوم سيّئة. تنادي onEnd(score) فقط.
====================================================================== */
function playFallingStars(opts){
  const container = opts.container;
  const words = (opts.words||[]).slice();
  const onEnd = opts.onEnd || function(){};
  const nashitaCalm  = opts.nashitaImg  || NASHITA_CONFIDENT || null;
  const nashitaCheer = opts.nashitaCheer || NASHITA_CELEBRATE || nashitaCalm;

  const MAX_MISTAKES   = 3;      // ٣ نجوم سيّئة = نهاية
  let   spawnInterval  = 0.62;   // يتسارع تدريجيًّا
  let   fallMin = 168, fallMax = 238;
  const SPEED_STEP = 5;         // كل ١٠ نقاط → تسريع

  container.innerHTML='';
  let score=0, mistakes=0, finished=false, nextSpeedUp=SPEED_STEP;
  const timers=[];
  const stars=[];
  let rafId=null, lastT=0, spawnAcc=0;

  /* ----- الصوت: Web Audio داخلي فقط ----- */
  function actx(){
    if(!playFallingStars._actx){
      const AC=window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext;
      playFallingStars._actx = AC? new AC() : null;
    }
    return playFallingStars._actx;
  }
  function beep(f1,f2,dur,type,vol){
    const ac=actx(); if(!ac) return;
    try{
      if(ac.state==='suspended') ac.resume();
      const o=ac.createOscillator(), g=ac.createGain();
      o.type=type||'sine'; o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f1,ac.currentTime);
      if(f2) o.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(f2,ac.currentTime+dur);
      g.gain.setValueAtTime(vol||0.12,ac.currentTime);
      g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,ac.currentTime+dur);
      o.connect(g); g.connect(ac.destination); o.start(); o.stop(ac.currentTime+dur);
    }catch(e){}
  }
  /* ----- نُطق الكلمة (SpeechSynthesis العربي، إن توفّر) ----- */
  let arVoice=null, voicesReady=false;
  function pickVoice(){
    if(!('speechSynthesis' in window)) return;
    const vs = speechSynthesis.getVoices();
    if(!vs || !vs.length) return;
    arVoice = vs.find(v=>/^ar/i.test(v.lang)) || null;
    voicesReady = true;
  }
  if('speechSynthesis' in window){
    pickVoice();
    speechSynthesis.onvoiceschanged = pickVoice;
  }
  function say(text, good){
    if(!('speechSynthesis' in window)) return;
    if(!voicesReady) pickVoice();
    if(!arVoice) return;                 // لا صوت عربي → نكتفي بالنغمة
    try{
      speechSynthesis.cancel();
      const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
      u.voice = arVoice; u.lang = arVoice.lang || 'ar-SA';
      u.rate  = 1.05;
      u.pitch = good ? 1.25 : 0.85;
      u.volume= 1;
      speechSynthesis.speak(u);
    }catch(e){}
  }

  const soundGood=()=>{beep(700,1050,0.09,'triangle',0.16);
    timers.push(setTimeout(()=>beep(1050,1400,0.12,'triangle',0.13),80));};
  const soundBad =()=>beep(300,150,0.16,'sawtooth',0.10);
  const soundUp  =()=>{beep(880,1320,0.10,'square',0.08);};
  const soundEnd =()=>{beep(392,0,0.16,'sine',0.12);
    timers.push(setTimeout(()=>beep(294,0,0.24,'sine',0.12),150));};

  const toAr=n=>String(n).replace(/[0-9]/g,d=>'٠١٢٣٤٥٦٧٨٩'[d]);

  /* ----- بناء المسرح ----- */
  const stage=document.createElement('div');
  stage.className='st-stage';
  stage.innerHTML=
    '<div class="st-hud">'+
      '<span class="st-chip">🧺 مسكت: <b class="score-n" id="stScore">٠</b></span>'+
      '<span class="st-chip"><span class="st-hearts" id="stHearts"></span></span>'+
    '</div>'+
    '<div class="st-field" id="stField"></div>';
  container.appendChild(stage);

  const field   = stage.querySelector('#stField');
  const scoreEl = stage.querySelector('#stScore');
  const heartsEl= stage.querySelector('#stHearts');
  const updateScore=()=>scoreEl.textContent=toAr(score);
  function updateHearts(){
    let h='';
    for(let i=0;i<MAX_MISTAKES;i++){
      h += (i<MAX_MISTAKES-mistakes) ? '❤️' : '<span class="off">❤️</span>';
    }
    heartsEl.innerHTML=h;
  }
  updateHearts();

  /* السماء */
  const sky=document.createElement('div');
  sky.className='st-sky';
  sky.style.backgroundImage='url('+SKY_IMG+')';
  stage.insertBefore(sky, stage.firstChild);

  /* الماسِك */
  const catcher=document.createElement('div');
  catcher.className='st-catcher';
  catcher.innerHTML=
    '<div class="st-basket" style="background-image:url('+BASKET_IMG+')"></div>'+
    '<img class="st-nashita" id="stNashita" src="'+(nashitaCalm||'')+'" alt="نشيطة">';
  field.appendChild(catcher);
  const nashitaImg=catcher.querySelector('#stNashita');

  let FW=field.clientWidth||360, FH=field.clientHeight||600;
  const CATCH_HALF = 44;                 // فم السلّة أضيق من صورتها → دقّة أعلى
  const CATCH_BAND_TOP = ()=>FH-176;     // أعلى فم السلّة (قاع ٦٠ + ارتفاع ١٢٤)
  const CATCH_BAND_BOT = ()=>FH-118;
  let catcherX = FW/2;
  function placeCatcher(){ catcher.style.left = catcherX+'px'; }
  placeCatcher();

  /* الحركة: تتبّع الإصبع في أيّ مكان داخل الإطار (لا داخل الملعب فقط) */
  const SURF = document.getElementById('frame') || field;
  function moveTo(clientX){
    const r=field.getBoundingClientRect();
    let x=clientX-r.left;
    x=Math.max(CATCH_HALF, Math.min(FW-CATCH_HALF, x));
    catcherX=x; placeCatcher();
  }
  const onDown = e=>{ if(finished)return; catcher.classList.add('grabbing'); moveTo(e.clientX); };
  const onMove = e=>{ if(finished)return; if(e.buttons||e.pointerType==='touch') moveTo(e.clientX); };
  const onUp   = ()=>catcher.classList.remove('grabbing');
  SURF.addEventListener('pointerdown',onDown,{passive:true});
  SURF.addEventListener('pointermove',onMove,{passive:true});
  SURF.addEventListener('pointerup',onUp);
  SURF.addEventListener('pointercancel',onUp);
  window.addEventListener('pointerup',onUp);
  function unbind(){
    SURF.removeEventListener('pointerdown',onDown);
    SURF.removeEventListener('pointermove',onMove);
    SURF.removeEventListener('pointerup',onUp);
    SURF.removeEventListener('pointercancel',onUp);
    window.removeEventListener('pointerup',onUp);
  }

  /* ----- اختيار الكلمات: ٥٠٪ حسنة / ٥٠٪ سيّئة (احتمال متساوٍ) ----- */
  const GOOD = words.filter(w=>w.good);
  const BAD  = words.filter(w=>!w.good);
  let gq=[], bq=[];
  function refill(arr){
    const c=arr.slice();
    for(let i=c.length-1;i>0;i--){const j=Math.floor(Math.random()*(i+1));[c[i],c[j]]=[c[j],c[i]];}
    return c;
  }
  function nextWord(){
    const useGood = Math.random() < 0.5;
    if(useGood && GOOD.length){ if(!gq.length) gq=refill(GOOD); return gq.pop(); }
    if(BAD.length){ if(!bq.length) bq=refill(BAD); return bq.pop(); }
    if(!gq.length) gq=refill(GOOD); return gq.pop();
  }

  function burst(cx,cy,color){
    for(let i=0;i<8;i++){
      const p=document.createElement('div');p.className='st-particle';
      p.style.background=color;p.style.left=cx+'px';p.style.top=cy+'px';
      field.appendChild(p);
      const ang=Math.random()*Math.PI*2,dist=24+Math.random()*38;
      requestAnimationFrame(()=>{p.style.transform='translate('+Math.cos(ang)*dist+'px,'+Math.sin(ang)*dist+'px) scale(0)';p.style.opacity='0';});
      timers.push(setTimeout(()=>p.remove(),520));
    }
  }
  let cheerT=null;
  function cheer(){
    nashitaImg.src=nashitaCheer;
    nashitaImg.classList.remove('cheer');void nashitaImg.offsetWidth;nashitaImg.classList.add('cheer');
    if(cheerT)clearTimeout(cheerT);
    cheerT=setTimeout(()=>{if(!finished){nashitaImg.src=nashitaCalm;nashitaImg.classList.remove('cheer');}},520);
    timers.push(cheerT);
  }

  function spawnStar(){
    const w=nextWord();
    const el=document.createElement('div');
    el.className='st-star '+(w.good?'good':'bad');
    el.innerHTML='<div class="st-shape" style="background-image:url('+(w.good?STAR_GOOD_IMG:STAR_BAD_IMG)+')"></div>'+
                 '<div class="st-word"><span>'+w.t+'</span></div>';
    const x = 44 + Math.random()*(Math.max(FW-88,60));
    const s={el,x,y:-40,vy:fallMin+Math.random()*(fallMax-fallMin),good:!!w.good,t:w.t,done:false};
    el.style.transform='translate('+x+'px,'+s.y+'px)';
    field.appendChild(el);
    stars.push(s);
  }

  function resolveStar(s,caught){
    if(s.done)return; s.done=true;
    if(caught){
      s.el.classList.add('caught');
      if(s.good){
        score++; updateScore(); soundGood(); say(s.t,true); cheer();
        burst(s.x,CATCH_BAND_TOP(),'#B983FF');
        if(score>=nextSpeedUp){
          nextSpeedUp+=SPEED_STEP;
          spawnInterval=Math.max(0.26, spawnInterval-0.04);
          fallMin=Math.min(400, fallMin+14);
          fallMax=Math.min(520, fallMax+18);
          soundUp();
        }
      }else{
        mistakes++; updateHearts(); soundBad(); say(s.t,false);
        burst(s.x,CATCH_BAND_TOP(),'#D1477E');
        stage.style.animation='none'; void stage.offsetWidth;
        stage.style.animation='shakeSt .3s ease';
      }
      timers.push(setTimeout(()=>s.el.remove(),340));
    }else{
      s.el.remove();
    }
    const i=stars.indexOf(s); if(i>=0)stars.splice(i,1);
    if(mistakes>=MAX_MISTAKES) endGame();
  }

  function loop(t){
    if(finished)return;
    if(!lastT)lastT=t;
    let dt=(t-lastT)/1000; lastT=t;
    if(dt>0.05)dt=0.05;

    spawnAcc+=dt;
    if(spawnAcc>=spawnInterval){
      spawnAcc=0; spawnStar();
      if(score>=25 && Math.random()<0.35) spawnStar();   // نجمتان معًا في المستويات المتقدّمة
    }

    const bandTop=CATCH_BAND_TOP(), bandBot=CATCH_BAND_BOT();
    for(let i=stars.length-1;i>=0;i--){
      const s=stars[i]; if(s.done)continue;
      s.y+=s.vy*dt;
      s.el.style.transform='translate('+s.x+'px,'+s.y+'px)';
      if(s.y>=bandTop && s.y<=bandBot && Math.abs(s.x-catcherX)<=CATCH_HALF){
        resolveStar(s,true);
        if(finished) return;
      }else if(s.y> FH+50){
        resolveStar(s,false);
      }
    }
    rafId=requestAnimationFrame(loop);
  }

  function endGame(){
    if(finished)return; finished=true;
    cleanup();
    soundEnd();
    setTimeout(()=>onEnd(score),620);
  }
  function cleanup(){
    if(rafId)cancelAnimationFrame(rafId);
    timers.forEach(clearTimeout);
    unbind();
    if('speechSynthesis' in window){ try{speechSynthesis.cancel();}catch(e){} }
  }
  playFallingStars._stop=()=>{finished=true;cleanup();container.innerHTML='';};

  requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
    FW=field.clientWidth||FW; FH=field.clientHeight||FH;
    catcherX=FW/2; placeCatcher();
    rafId=requestAnimationFrame(loop);
  });
}


/* ==================== الغلاف الدعائي ==================== */
const HOST = document.getElementById('gameHost');
let PLAYER_NAME = '';
const toArA = n => String(n).replace(/[0-9]/g, d => '٠١٢٣٤٥٦٧٨٩'[d]);

function showStart(){
  HOST.innerHTML =
    '<div class="scr" style="background-image:url('+BG_START+')">'+
      '<div class="name-box">'+
        '<label class="name-lbl" for="pName">ما اسمُك أيّها البطل؟</label>'+
        '<input class="name-in" id="pName" type="text" maxlength="18" autocomplete="off" placeholder="اكتب اسمك هنا…">'+
        '<div class="name-err" id="nameErr"></div>'+
      '</div>'+
      '<div class="start-btn-wrap"><button class="btn-go" id="startBtn">ابدأ اللعب</button></div>'+
    '</div>';
  const inp = document.getElementById('pName');
  const err = document.getElementById('nameErr');
  if(PLAYER_NAME) inp.value = PLAYER_NAME;
  function go(){
    const v = inp.value.trim();
    if(v.length < 2){ err.textContent = 'اكتب اسمك أوّلًا 🐝'; inp.focus(); return; }
    PLAYER_NAME = v; startGame();
  }
  document.getElementById('startBtn').addEventListener('click', go);
  inp.addEventListener('input', ()=>{ err.textContent=''; });
  inp.addEventListener('keydown', e=>{ if(e.key==='Enter'){ e.preventDefault(); go(); } });
}

function startGame(){
  const arena = document.createElement('div');
  arena.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;';
  HOST.innerHTML = '';
  HOST.appendChild(arena);
  playFallingStars({ container: arena, words: WORDS, onEnd: showEnd });
}

function showEnd(score){
  const ov = document.createElement('div');
  ov.className = 'scr';
  ov.style.backgroundImage = 'url('+BG_END+')';
  ov.innerHTML =
    '<div class="end-name">'+ escapeHtml(PLAYER_NAME) +'</div>'+
    '<div class="end-card">'+
      '<div class="end-score">جمعتَ '+ toArA(score) +' خُلُقًا حسنًا! ⭐</div>'+
      '<div class="end-rank">رتبتك: '+ rankOf(score) +'</div>'+
    '</div>'+
    '<div class="end-btns">'+
      '<button class="end-btn g" id="dlCardBtn">📥 حمّل بطاقتك</button>'+
      '<button class="end-btn p" id="storyBtn">🦅 اعرف أكثر عن هيثم</button>'+
    '</div>';
  document.getElementById('frame').appendChild(ov);
  document.getElementById('dlCardBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>downloadCard(score));
  document.getElementById('storyBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>showInfo());
}


/* ==================== شاشة التعريف بهيثم ==================== */
const FACEBOOK_URL = 'https://www.facebook.com/share/14nQWRvHyog/';

function showInfo(){
  const iv = document.createElement('div');
  iv.className = 'info';
  iv.style.backgroundImage = 'url('+BG_INFO+')';
  iv.innerHTML =
    '<div class="info-btns">'+
      '<button class="info-btn fb" id="fbBtn">👍 تابِعنا على فيسبوك</button>'+
      '<button class="info-btn g" id="replayBtn">🔁 العب مرّة أخرى</button>'+
    '</div>';
  document.getElementById('frame').appendChild(iv);
  document.getElementById('fbBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>window.open(FACEBOOK_URL,'_blank'));
  document.getElementById('replayBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    document.querySelectorAll('.info, .scr').forEach(n=>n.remove());
    showStart();
  });
}

/* ---- بطاقة النتيجة كصورة تُحمَّل على الهاتف ---- */
function downloadCard(score){
  const W=1080, H=1350;
  const cv=document.createElement('canvas'); cv.width=W; cv.height=H;
  const cx=cv.getContext('2d');

  const bg=new Image();
  bg.onload=()=>{
    /* الخلفية (قصّ يملأ) */
    const r=Math.max(W/bg.width, H/bg.height);
    const dw=bg.width*r, dh=bg.height*r;
    cx.drawImage(bg,(W-dw)/2,(H-dh)/2,dw,dh);

    /* حجاب داكن خفيف لوضوح النص */
    const gr=cx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,H);
    gr.addColorStop(0,'rgba(20,24,52,.55)'); gr.addColorStop(.55,'rgba(20,24,52,.15)');
    gr.addColorStop(1,'rgba(20,24,52,.72)');
    cx.fillStyle=gr; cx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);

    cx.textAlign='center'; cx.direction='rtl';

    /* الاسم */
    cx.font='700 92px Amiri, serif';
    cx.shadowColor='rgba(232,169,61,.9)'; cx.shadowBlur=34;
    cx.fillStyle='#FFFFFF';
    cx.fillText(PLAYER_NAME, W/2, 290);

    /* النتيجة */
    cx.shadowBlur=18; cx.shadowColor='rgba(0,0,0,.6)';
    cx.font='700 74px Amiri, serif'; cx.fillStyle='#E8A93D';
    cx.fillText('جمعتُ '+toArA(score)+' خُلُقًا حسنًا ⭐', W/2, 420);

    /* الرتبة */
    cx.font='800 56px Tajawal, sans-serif'; cx.fillStyle='#D8BBFF';
    cx.fillText(rankOf(score), W/2, 510);

    /* هيثم */
    const eg=new Image();
    eg.onload=()=>{
      const eh=430, ew=eg.width*(eh/eg.height);
      cx.shadowBlur=26; cx.shadowColor='rgba(0,0,0,.55)';
      cx.drawImage(eg,(W-ew)/2, 620, ew, eh);
      cx.shadowBlur=0;

      /* شريط الدعوة */
      cx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.95)';
      roundRect(cx, 90, 1090, W-180, 120, 40); cx.fill();
      cx.fillStyle='#232A45';
      cx.font='800 44px Tajawal, sans-serif';
      cx.fillText('تعلّم الأخلاق مع هيثم 🦅', W/2, 1150);
      cx.font='700 34px Tajawal, sans-serif'; cx.fillStyle='#2EB8A0';
      cx.fillText('ركن صافي 🌿', W/2, 1195);

      cx.font='700 30px Tajawal, sans-serif';
      cx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.85)';
      cx.fillText('نُشيطة والنجوم الطيّبة', W/2, 1285);

      saveCanvas(cv);
    };
    eg.onerror=()=>saveCanvas(cv);
    eg.src=HAYTHAM_IMG;
  };
  bg.onerror=()=>{};
  bg.src=BG_START;
}

function roundRect(c,x,y,w,h,r){
  c.beginPath();
  c.moveTo(x+r,y); c.lineTo(x+w-r,y); c.quadraticCurveTo(x+w,y,x+w,y+r);
  c.lineTo(x+w,y+h-r); c.quadraticCurveTo(x+w,y+h,x+w-r,y+h);
  c.lineTo(x+r,y+h); c.quadraticCurveTo(x,y+h,x,y+h-r);
  c.lineTo(x,y+r); c.quadraticCurveTo(x,y,x+r,y); c.closePath();
}

function saveCanvas(cv){
  try{
    const a=document.createElement('a');
    a.download='نجوم-الأخلاق-'+PLAYER_NAME+'.png';
    a.href=cv.toDataURL('image/png');
    document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); a.remove();
  }catch(e){}
}

function escapeHtml(s){
  return String(s).replace(/[&<>"']/g, c => ({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[c]));
}

showStart();
</script>
</body>
</html>
